DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
DisableTaxConfirm: Heads up — Gerry's cut is the mod's balance. The trunk is designed as a convenience tax: you trade a slice of value for skipping the walk to a vendor. Disabling it makes the trunk strictly better than selling directly and sidesteps that tradeoff. Your save, your call.
Message1: Thanks for installing Gerry's Junk Trunk!
Message2: - Gerry's trunk is initially limited to ten spaces.
Message4: - Once items go in, they don't come out.
Message5: - Items in the trunk are sold when the day ends (moon a little past the church).
Message6: - You get more at the vendor. Gerry takes a cut of the profits.
Message7: - The trunk has three levels of progress, initial unlock and then two enhancements, linked to certain tech/perks.
Stage1Des: Crafted at: Yard build desk. Has 10 slots with a max stack size of 50.
Stage2Des: Gerry's junk trunk is expanded! Now has 20 slots with a max stack size of 50.
Stage3Des: Gerry takes a smaller cut of the profits and max stack size increased to 100.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose Gerry and shipping-box diagnostics to the BepInEx console. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.gerry.name: Gerry
cfg.gerry.desc: Turn on Gerry's buyback service. Items left in the shipping box are sold and Gerry shows up to pay you.
cfg.cinematic_mode.name: Cinematic Mode
cfg.cinematic_mode.desc: On: the camera focuses on Gerry and you cannot move during his visit. Off: Gerry still shows up and speaks but the game keeps running normally around you.
cfg.convenience_tax.name: Convenience Tax
cfg.convenience_tax.desc: On: Gerry takes a cut of every sale (30% before the Best Friend perk, 20% after). Off: you keep the full vendor value.
cfg.show_disable_tax_popup.name: Show Disable Tax Popup
cfg.show_disable_tax_popup.desc: Show the in-game advisory dialog when you turn the Convenience Tax off. Turn off if you have read it once and do not need the reminder.
cfg.shipping_box_tint.name: Shipping Box Tint
cfg.shipping_box_tint.desc: Tint colour multiplied over the shipping box sprite. White means no tint. Pick a darker colour to make the box less visually loud.
cfg.show_sold_messages_on_player.name: Show Sold Messages On Player
cfg.show_sold_messages_on_player.desc: Show the earned-coin bubble above your character instead of above the shipping box when Gerry pays out.
cfg.show_item_price_tooltips.name: Show Item Price Tooltips
cfg.show_item_price_tooltips.desc: Show each item shipping-box sale price as a tooltip when hovering over it in inventories.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
